title: hypoporum interruptum
intro: Hypoporum interruptum, also known as the interrupted hypoporum or hypoporum plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Hypoporellaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Hypoporum interruptum has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its secondary metabolites. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal activities. Hypoporum interruptum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed as a remedy for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
intro_study: According to "International journal of leprosy and other mycobacterial diseases : official organ of the International Leprosy Association", hypoporum interruptum (also known as oil of hydnocarpus) has been found to have a positive effect in wound healing, increasing the strength of scar tissue and collagen tissue, and promoting a significant increase in body weight.
